rules.title: Prefer SubsPlease releases
rules.description: SubsPlease provides fast, consistent CR rips with standard naming

rules.title: Prefer Erai-raws releases
rules.description: Erai-raws provides multi-sub releases from multiple streaming sources

rules.title: Block mini encodes
rules.description: Mini encodes sacrifice quality for size — block known groups

rules.title: Prefer batch releases
rules.description: Batch releases (v2, BD) are typically higher quality than initial TV rips

rules.title: Require Japanese audio (post-download)
rules.description: Block imported files that don't contain a Japanese audio track
